description: A single 3x demand spike mid-horizon; tests recovery within the protection interval.
An 8-week demand collapse; tests whether a policy keeps ordering into dead stock.
Lead time tripled to 3 periods; tests pipeline-aware ordering under delayed receipts.
Demand permanently shifted up to lambda=16; the generalization / overfitting probe.
A 3-week zero-demand stretch; tests holding-cost discipline (no ordering into a glut).
Sustained high demand against the order/capacity limits; a safety regression test.
A drought then a surge that tempts large catch-up orders above the human-approval gate.
